
  # IMS Repository Code (CopyNewDesign)

  This is a code bundle for IMS Repository Code (CopyNewDesign). The original project is available at https://www.figma.com/design/jmVFn0WvwndhIJSvXHZCiC/IMS-Repository-Code--CopyNewDesign-.

  ## Running the code

  Run `npm i` to install the dependencies.

  Run `npm run dev` to start the development server.
